articles.title: ECE Roadmap — Part II
articles.excerpt: This will be the last part of the career series. Career tracks, job titles, advice on choosing your path, and 10 key actions every engineering student should take.

articles.title: ECE Career — Part 1
articles.excerpt: Hierarchy of systems in ECE — from analog ICs to communication systems. How to choose your tier using Ikigai and what academia versus industry actually requires.

articles.title: ECE Philosophy — Part I
articles.excerpt: The revolution of electronics, the history of ECE and why it matters. A philosophical grounding for engineering students entering the field.
